title: Pass 3 — Inline-Editable Continuity Signals
summary: Pass 3 made the continuity signals in the right rail inline-editable within the active session workspace. A single new VaultStore method handles the mutation. `ContinuitySignalRow` gained optional edit mode via an `onUpdate` closure; read-only display (home dashboard, empty states) is unchanged. Three new XCTest methods cover persistence, field isolation, and timestamp correctness. Cody verified the pass with `swift build` and `Tools/run-tests.sh`; 46 tests passed with 0 failures.
